# Auto-generated prettier chain signature. Do not edit manually.
# Regenerate: deno task fixtures:update:formatted <pattern>
#
# Each %%PASS=N%% section is exactly prettier^N(output_prettier.<ext>).
# This file exists when prettier is non-idempotent on output_prettier.* — it pins
# the full chain so the audit recognizes the case and the validator catches drift.
# See docs/fixture_overview.md (rule F4) and crates/tsv_debug/src/fixtures/audit_signature.rs.

%%PASS=2 (fixed point)%%
<script lang="ts">
	// `[`-line comment: tsv keeps it on the `[` line; prettier relocates it to the key's own line
	class A {
		[
			// a
			key: string
		]: number;
	}
	// key→`:` comment: the bracket breaks so the `//` can't swallow `:`; tsv indents the
	// `: type` continuation one level, prettier keeps it flush
	class B {
		[
			key // b
			: string
		]: number;
	}
	// `:`→key-type comment: the key type continues on its own line, indented one level
	class C {
		[
			key: // c
			string
		]: number;
	}
	// own-line comment before `]`: tsv keeps its line; prettier pulls it up to trail the key type
	class D {
		[
			key: string // d
		]: number;
	}
</script>
